creator: dom@happygiraffe.net
text:
I have changed my email address and wish the ports I maintain to
	reflect this.

	If you wish verification, please email a request to
	dom@myrddin.demon.co.uk.  You should also be able to check by
	looking at the whois output for happygiraffe.net.

Fix: Here's a patch which corrects all the ports I Maintain.
How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
